name: close_msg_db
full_help:
close_msg_db

Description: 
Close Message Db file

Syntax: 
close_msg_db  [-file <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-file]     Message file to be closed
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Report

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
